name: a pair of enormous arms
description: Two massive arms hang from somewhere above, too large to belong to anything that should fit in this space. The fingers are long and wrong-jointed. They twitch and flex with a patience that suggests intelligence, then periodically rake downward at everything below.
explosionMessages: The arms lunge downward, clawing blindly at the ground!
A massive hand rakes across the space, fingers splayed and grasping!
The arms scrabble frantically, nails dragging against the floor with a sound like tearing metal!
One arm sweeps low while the other slams down, trapping everything between them!
The fingers flex and claw in a sudden frenzy, scorching where they touch!

name: a flaming barrel
description: A rusted oil drum, inexplicably ablaze. Flames lick from its open top in rhythmic pulses, as if something inside keeps detonating. It shouldn't be here. Nothing should.
explosionMessages: The barrel erupts in a gout of flame!
Fire bursts from the barrel with a deafening crack!
The barrel belches a wave of searing heat!
An explosion rocks the barrel, sending sparks everywhere!
A column of fire shoots from the barrel, singeing everything nearby!
